zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Heathcote於1549年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Ralf Heathcote21歲，母親Juliana Kinder19歲。他於大約1574年與Jane Renshawe在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1619年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Heathcote于1549年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Ralf Heathcote21岁，母亲Juliana Kinder19岁。他于大约1574年与Jane Renshawe在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1619年在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Heathcote
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Heathcote in Hartington (Derbyshire), Heathcote in Warwick (Warwickshire), or Heathcote Farm in Wasperton (Warwickshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. In Yorkshire, this name is pronounced Hethkett.

variants.name: Hathcoat
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcott
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcoat
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Heathcote was born in 1549, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralf Heathcote, was 21 and his mother, Juliana Kinder, was 19. He married Jane Renshawe about 1574, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1619, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Heathcote est né en 1549, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralf Heathcote, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Juliana Kinder, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Jane Renshawe environ 1574, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1619, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Heathcote 1549 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralf Heathcote 21 und seine Mutter Juliana Kinder 19. Er hat um 1574 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Renshawe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1619 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Heathcote è nato il nel 1549 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralf Heathcote, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Kinder, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Jane Renshawe circa 1574, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1619, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Heathcoteが1549年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Ralf Heathcoteは21歳，母Juliana Kinderは19歳であった。約1574年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでJane Renshaweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1619年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Heathcote(이)가 1549년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralf Heathcote(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Kinder(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Jane Renshawe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1619년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Heathcote nasceu em 1549, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralf Heathcote, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Kinder, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Renshawe aproximadamente 1574, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1619, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Heathcote родился в 1549 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralf Heathcote было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana Kinder, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Renshawe около 1574 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1619 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Heathcote nació en 1549, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralf Heathcote, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Juliana Kinder, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jane Renshawe aproximadamente 1574, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1619, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
